# Databricks Setup Environment Roadmap

# 1. Foundation
## 1.1 Workspace setup
Attivita:
- Create workspace
- Configure VNET
- Enable secure cluster connectivity
Verifica:
- Workspace reachable via browser
Output atteso:
Workspace ready for onboarding
Done quando:
All connectivity checks pass
Tracking:
Owner: Platform Team
Stato:
Backlog

## 1.2 Cluster policy
Attivita:
- Define cluster policies
- Apply policy to default clusters
Verifica:
- Policy enforced on new clusters
Output atteso:
Standardized cluster governance
Done quando:
Policies applied to all default clusters
Tracking:
Owner: Data Engineering

# 2. Data access
## 2.1 Secret scope
Attivita:
- Create secret scope
- Store service principal credentials
Verifica:
- Secrets retrievable by notebooks
Output atteso:
Secure secret management
Done quando:
Secret scope validated
Tracking:
Owner: Security
Stato:
Todo
